programme.title: Top Chef S16
programme.desc: All season the chefs have been growing gardens at their Kentucky estate. Tom ambushes the sleeping chefs and challenges them to reap what they sowed and make a dish focused on their garden harvest. Then, for the last elimination challenge in Kentucky, the chefs head to Keeneland, a thoroughbred horse auction house, to bid on luxury ingredients for dishes to show gratitude to their culinary mentors. Chefs Bryan Voltaggio, Gavin Kaysen, JD Fratzke, Kim Alter, David Posey and Chris Coombs join the judges to see how far the Chefs have come and who deserves to go to Macau for the finals.

programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Judge Graham Elliot, who has a restaurant in Macau, introduces the Chefs to the local market full of fascinating ingredients and challenges them to a Quickfire highlighting unique Macanese proteins. Since it is the Year of the Pig, the dishes must feature pork products and be delicious enough to impress Hong Kong’s super chef Jowett Yu along with Tom, Padma and Graham.

programme.title: The Sheriff In Town

programme.title: Il Mare
programme.desc: A young woman from 1999 and a young man from 1997 begin a parallel-time love story separated by a span of two years when they start to receive each other's letters in the mailbox.

programme.title: Abroad

programme.title: Room No. 7
programme.desc: Doo-Sik tries to evade bankruptcy by selling his DVD screening business, but a crisis arises as he discovers a corpse and a stash of drugs that belongs to his employee in screening room number seven.

programme.title: Something In The Rain Ep1
programme.desc: When a single career woman reunites with her best friend's younger brother after he returns from three years of working abroad, their efforts to reconnect grow into romance.

programme.desc: The movie follows In-yong, an ever-optimistic girl who loses her mother in a car accident, struggles to stay strong on her own. As she is kicked out because of her overdue rent, she finds support from her teacher, her classmate and a pharmacist friend to overcome hardship.

programme.title: Gyeong-Ah's Daughter
programme.desc: After her husband passed away, Gyeong-ah relies on her daughter Yeon-su. But they barely meet each other. One day, Gyeong-ah gets an anonymous message about Yeon-su and goes into trauma...

programme.title: The Tiger
programme.desc: While the Kingdom of Korea is under occupation by the Japanese, an old and experienced hunter is challenged by the hunt of the last tiger in the country.

programme.title: The Magician
programme.desc: A talented young magician falls for a princess betrothed to his former teacher, leading to a fierce showdown between the two powerful magicians.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The Knights set off on their patrol but are delayed by someone playing tricks on them. Noddy investigates: who's playing tricks on the Knights? He soon finds them in Fable Forest, waylaid by yet another cheeky trick. Noddy will have to find the culprit before the Knights end up in serious trouble!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: The railway tracks are being repaired all over Toyland by the Builders, so Farmer Tom, Tractor and a trailer are running a replacement service. But the repairs take longer than expected when the Builders' tools go missing. Noddy investigates, and finds that Cloppycorn loved the trailer rides so much that he hid the biolders' tools in a basket that Pat-Pat had asked him to take to the other Naughticorns. Cloppycorn apologies, the tracks are swiftly repaired, and Cloppycorn happily rides around the farm on the trailer. Well done Noddy !

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch embark on a road trip to Chew York City to track down Kelly Korgi to ask her to perform at Pawston’s 100th birthday party.\ When Kelly Korgi tells Tag she can’t perform at Pawston’s 100th birthday party, she and Scooch decide to create a Kelly Korgi replacement so that she doesn’t break her promise to the town.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag tries to prove to Mom that she’s a big dog by puppysitting Yip and Rhonda all day. All she has to do is get them to the playground, but the pups keep running off. \ When a giant, bone-shaped, roller coaster ride goes missing from the Amusement Bark, Detectives Tag and Scooch take on the case of the slobbery robbery.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: The Dinotrux get caught in a powerful sandstorm that stops them in their tracks, which leaves Ty Rux and the Reptools to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The girls get summer jobs to help Lucky repair the sprawling house she inherited from her grandfather near the Rosemead Valley Racetrack.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk cheer up Squawk to avoid the first final exam/Eep and Lerk venture to the Garden of Eaten after the Broods spike the Watering Hole

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: To learn about jobs, Grug assigns kids to the first “shadowing”/Ugga mistakenly creates the first gossip to impress the “nitting” club

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Thinking he's allergic to Meatlug, Fishlegs gets hypnotized – and wakes up transformed into an invincible warrior known as Thor Bonecrusher.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby must "de-stink" Simmons after a misfire of Stinkless Serum, and Tim & Danny try to upgrade their small- scale taxi business

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Frederic Estes tries to get babies banned from the local library, the babies fight back in a war for story time

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: On a dark and stormy night, Tim's fears of a local legend and Boss Baby's fear of a PuppyCo agent force the brothers to unite to stay safe as the house is infiltrated

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Captain Underpants becomes a wanted man in underwear when footage surfaces of a robber who looks exactly like him. George and Harold, positive it's an impostor, try to track down the perp and bring him to justice. But can the boys do this before Captain Underpants is found guilty?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: As a prank, George and Harold use Melvin's new animal hybrid invention to create a creature that's a cross between a butt and a fly. But some of the monster butt-erflies want to eat everything in sight- including the students hiding out in the school gym!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: After helping George and Harold make a comic featuring the heroine Plungerina, Erica asserts that Plungerina could be better that Captain Underpants. To prove her wrong, the boys decide to actually create the villain in the comic and then have Captain Underpants save the day. Unfortunately, Krupp - and therefore Captain Underpants - is away at a principals' convention.There's no one to save them...until a real life Plungerina saves tthe day! But who is really Plungerina?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Eruptodon can't take its egg into the Great Volcano, Hiccup and Fishlegs must go into the dangerous volcano with the egg before it's too late.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The Trollhunters race to stop Gunmar from acquiring a powerful relic, and Jim must do the unthinkable to stop him!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Team Trollhunter discovers a surprising ally while trapped in a flooding tavern!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When the new exchange students come to town, the kids are stopped from running an imperative errand.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Blade gets to see Po's kung fu mastery, but doesn't agree to team up with him until she realizes that he accidentally holds the key to finding Klaus and Veruca: he has a piece of the WuGao Gauntlet. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When General Morando and Colonel Kubritz attack the Mothership, Team Tarron must fight to protect the King and Queen’s Cores and their lives… with shocking, fatal results.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Monkey used to play on the ground and he loved to wind up Crocodile. One day the Big Rains came and Monkey got stranded up the Mango Tree. Nasty Crocodile promised to take him to dry land…. But only in exchange for one thing…. His HEART! Monkey tricked Crocodile and when Crocodile found out that Monkey swapped his heart for a measley mango, he chased Monkey up a tree. From that day on Monkey swings in the trees keeping well clear of Crocodiles angry snaps! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tickbird didn't sit on Hippo's back, infact they weren't friends at all! Tickbird was sick of Hippo splashing all the time. One day tiny Tickbird challenges big Hippo to a contest… who can drink the most water in a single gulp! Tickbird outwits Hippo by using the tides and from that day she is allowed to sit on Hippo's back and pick off all the yummy ticks she can eat! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Pat must deliver an old bath tub to Pencaster Lighthouse. But when he goes to collect it from Thompson Ground, the bath ends up rolling away into Greendale with Jess inside! When Pat catches up with the bath he finds PC Selby about to impound it for being an un-road-worthy vehicle. Pat explains it's a Special Delivery and at last gets on his way. But when he arrives in Pencaster Bay, Micawber and Jess between them manage to loosen the rope tying up the SDS Boat and it goes chugging off to sea with no one on board! So Pat and Jess use the bath as a boat and paddle out to rescue the boat then at last deliver the old bath to Chris. SDS Mission accomplished - mioaw!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is on holiday, so Sarah Gilbertson is looking after her dog Bonnie. She calls in on Pat and proves she has zero control over the dog. But there is only time for Jess to roll his eyes before Pat is called out on a special delivery - it's urgent! He has to deliver the RADARSCOPE (designed by Ted) to Mrs Goggins, who is up in Scotland! Pat has no idea what a radarscope is and neither does Ben. But they know what urgent means, so they spring into action and load it into Pat's jet plane. Back in Greendale Bonnie gives Sarah the slip, and PC Selby becomes embroiled in an escalating search... up in Scotland meanwhile, Pat lands but doesn't even get an explanation of the radarscope as time is pressing, and he, Jess, and their technological bit of kit are bundled into a boat and they set out over the loch... Loch Ness! While the search for mischievous Bonnie intensifies back home, Pat realizes they are searching for a creature of their own - the Loch Ness Monster!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Fuse asks Noddy to take a present to the Pockets. But when Noddy arrives at the Treehouse, he discovers he's carrying an empty box. The present, whatever it was, has gone! Noddy must investigate: where is the Pockets' present? But how will he ever find it when he doesn't actually know what it is? It's going to take all his detecting skills to solve this one!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: When Fuse invites his friends to come for a playdate all they want to do is play his new computer game. But then suddenly the computer goes off. He soon discovers there's a power cut affecting the whole of Brickabuild. But who switched off the power? And why? Desperate to carry on with the game, Noddy decides to investigate: how can they play Fuse's new game?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Queen Sparklewings asks the Pirate Captain to do the first dance with her at the Queen's Dance. But when it's time to practise, the Captain can't come: someone's stolen their treasure! Noddy decides to help find the treasure so the Captain will still be able to dance. He needs to investigate: Who stole the Pirates' treasure?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: Clockwork Mouse leaves Carlton in charge of getting everything ready for the Builders' Parade. Carlton gratefully accepts Noddy's offer of help but doesn't want the Naughticorns helping too! But when Carlton goes to the Brickabuild Store for supplies, he's horrified to discover the store is empty. How will they get the parade ready now? And will Clockwork Mouse ever trust Carlton again? Noddy sets out to investigate: Who took all the stuff from the Brickabuild Store?

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: The Oath
programme.desc: 400 A.D., in a forgotten time of Ancient America, a lone Hebraic fugitive must preserve the history of his fallen nation while being hunted by a ruthless tyrant. But rescuing the King's abused mistress could awaken a warrior's past.

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil
programme.desc: An assassin goes to Thailand in order to solve a kidnapping case and finds himself chased by a man whose sibling he killed.

programme.title: 10 X 10
programme.desc: A man abducts a flower shop owner and holds her captive in a small, soundproof room in an effort to extract a dark secret from her past

programme.title: Midnight
programme.desc: A serial killer ruthlessly hunts down a deaf woman through the streets of South Korea after she witnesses his brutal crime.

programme.title: Go-Go Sisters
programme.desc: Go-go sisters brings together two parallel stories about young ambitious teenage girls and middle-aged women who have experienced life's sweet spiciness.

programme.title: Once A Thief
programme.desc: A romantic and action-packed story of three best friends, a group of high-end art thieves, who come into trouble when a love-triangle forms between them

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: A chef who loses his restaurant job starts up a food truck in an effort to reclaim his creative promise, while piecing back together his estranged family.

programme.title: The Vanishing
programme.desc: Three lighthouse keepers on the remote Flannan Isles find a hidden trunk of gold that becomes the catalyst to a struggle for survival

programme.title: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: An untested American submarine captain teams with U.S. Navy Seals to rescue the Russian president, who gets kidnap by a rogue general, to avoid an all-out war

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A virtuous Hong Kong police officer must clear his good name when the drug lords he is after frame him for the murder of a dirty cop

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: A musical drama about a wife who asks her husband to help her find her childhood sweetheart as a birthday present. Though reluctant, her husband's only choice is to set out on this journey with her.

programme.title: The Late Bloomer
programme.desc: The story of an adult male who, after the successful removal of a benign tumor resting against his pituitary gland, experiences all the changes and effects of puberty over a three-week period.

programme.title: Death Forest 5
programme.desc: People begin to see the creepy white face monster Yoshie in Shibuya.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 83
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 9
programme.desc: As world news continues to dominate our headlines, Foreign Correspondent is back in 2026 with an action-packed season of stories reflecting the times in which we live.

programme.title: Art Works - The Artist, Rose Riebl, Dr Jamin, WOMAD
programme.desc: Thom Monckton's The Artist struggles to find his paintbrush; pianist Rose Riebl talks Icelandic influences; we meet Hobart street artist Jamin; and inflatable dancers take over Adelaide's Botanic Gardens as part of WOMAD.

programme.title: Australia In Colour - Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Modern Australia is founded on the back of British convicts; crime and punishment, murder and mayhem, is part of its DNA.

programme.title: Alone Australia - Episode 3
programme.desc: A triumphant catch starves of the hunger of one survivalist, but as the adrenaline of the adventure fades, can the others pivot their strategies to bring in food?

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 83
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice - Michael Theo
programme.desc: Love on the Spectrum star and promising actor, Michael Theo wants to be whisked away to a desert island with some delicious treats - he's come to the right place!

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 9
programme.desc: As world news continues to dominate our headlines, Foreign Correspondent is back in 2026 with an action-packed season of stories reflecting the times in which we live.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 117
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 65
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.desc: The team heads west to the Margaret River region. Kristy starts off in Karridale, Craig calls on a family of hemp growers, Halina meets a couple whose homesickness for Finnish sauna culture turned into a thriving business.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Seventy-year-old widower Ben Whittaker has discovered that retirement isn't all it's cracked up to be. Seizing an opportunity to get back in the game, he becomes a senior intern at an online fashion site, founded and run by Jules Ostin.

programme.title: Films & Stars 2026/27 - EP 3
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Animal Impossible - EP 7
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Junior Bake Off S8 - EP 2
programme.desc: The junior version of this global phenomenon returns, hosted by BAFTA-winning comedian Harry Hill. Pastry chef and food writer Ravneet Gill and Bake Off alumnus Liam Charles return to judge the efforts of more budding bakers. It's a mouth-watering journey, as 16 of the country's best young bakers compete. A joyful way of getting children passionate about food.

programme.title: Croc Watch and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall - EP 1
programme.desc: With his trademark adventure-style approach, Steve takes us to South Africa’s Ndumo Game Reserve to explore the dangerous world of hippos and crocs. Remarkable moments include the tagging of a formidable three-meter-long crocodile the unique dietary habits of hippos (and how they cause conflict with local farmers) and how vulnerable these creatures are to climate change.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: In this game show, hosted by the iconic RuPaul, the simplest of words could be worth thousands of dollars. Lingo is the fast paced word-play game that keeps on innovating for new audiences, with its mix of skill, tension, humour and the chance to win big cash prizes. Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Lingo UK S2 - EP 10

Teams are pitted against each other in a battle to fill in the blanks and find words.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6 - EP 25
programme.desc: Ollie, Sloppy and Cherry try to clear out the stuff in their house. But Sloppy's too attached to his robots to give them away. He hides them instead. After a robot disaster, Sloppy figures out how to let go of the ones he doesn't need and keep the ones he does. Ollie find a mysterious purple hat and a book of magic tricks by the door and decides to become a magician. Odd things start happening and Ollie's magic tricks don't seem to work.

And we learn much more about each of the Go Jetters too. Travelling from the top of the planet to the very bottom, their action-packed adventures take them to truly incredible places. And there's a good chance Grandmaster Glitch has got there first to cause his usual chaos!

programme.desc: Mr. Mengo's annual float parade has been disrupted by a huge gust of wind! With the help of compass directions and Number 4, Can the Number Squad gather all the floats in time before sunset? The Number Squad is called in to help Aamil beat his dad's golf score, while also ensuring he causes as little destruction as possible around the Desert.

programme.title: The Little Prince And His Friends S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: In this new series, two children (Elijah and Charlotte) begin a fabulous journey to the stars with the Little Prince and his fantastic crew, the Fox and the Rose. An extraordinary journey aboard the most brilliant and unexpected of spaceships.

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures - EP 58
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters - EP 35
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Bakugan 3.1 - EP 24
programme.desc: The Bakugan brawlers are back with new Bakugan buddies! Watch out for an all new origin story.

programme.title: Johnny Test S4 - EP 8
programme.desc: The adventures of average suburban boy Johnny Test, who wittingly plays test subject for his genius twin sisters' various experiments, reluctantly fighting evil villains in the process.

programme.title: Transformers Earthspark S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: A new species of Transformers must find their place and purpose among Autobots, Decepticons, and the human family who adopts them.

programme.title: Viking Skool - EP 7
programme.desc: Three young students, Erik, Ylva and Arni, embark on challenging and thrilling adventures while they train to become glorious Viking warriors.

programme.title: Pokemon Ultimate Journeys: The Series - EP 46
programme.desc: The stakes are higher than ever for Ash, Goh, and Chloe as they advance toward their goals! As the Pokmon World Coronation Series tournament heats up, intensive training is in store for Ash, Pikachu, and their Pokmon friends.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 36
programme.desc: Joseph braces himself for his annual doctor's review. Hwee Ling cancels her travel plans to continue her radiotherapy, and Eugene worries about his marathon training after switching to chemotherapy.

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 2
programme.desc: That new house smell. Is it making you sick? Possibly. There’s been a surge in formaldehyde removal services. How much should you worry? And what can you do about it? Steven Chia finds out.

programme.title: Crimewatch 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: A baby’s uncontrolled cries lead to a violent assault. Watch how officers from the Criminal Investigation Department work together with GRF officers and IOs from various Land Divisions, as well as forensic experts from the Health Sciences Authority, to expose the offender’s desperate cover-up and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Clean it, Fix it – Series 4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Master builder and household favourite Tommy Walsh, expert pro cleaner Maxine Dwyer and creative carpenter Asher Edwards help people across the UK to renovate and improve their homes. The team has two days to transform a living space in desperate need of some love. Series 4 sees enterprising co-presenter Mark Wright and a new expert de-clutterer join in the challenge of making tired homes relievable – without breaking the bank.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 26
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: The Chase S16 - EP 21
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 125
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Moneyball S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Ian Wright presents the game show where the difference between winning life-changing money and going home with nothing rests entirely on the roll of a ball.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 54
programme.desc: A major event at the restaurant goes disastrously wrong when a health inspector arrives — and a shocking discovery is found in Aunty Lee’s food, putting the business in serious jeopardy.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into Thailand With Sue Perkins - EP 4
programme.desc: Sue Perkins is set to get lost in Thailand and promises to offer a unique blend of adventure, culture, and humour. The series follows Sue as she embarks on an extraordinary journey across three regions of Thailand, pushing her limits and diving deep into the country’s rich culture.

programme.title: Code of Silence - EP 3
programme.desc: When the police ask Deaf catering worker Alison to lip-read criminals' conversations, she is plunged into a high-stakes new world. Her assessment of the gang’s clandestine meetings quickly becomes key to unlocking the investigation. But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison’s feelings about the case become complicated.

programme.title: The Good Ship Murder S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: As the cruise ship arrives in Sicily, a deadly family saga unfolds involving a successful businessman, his children and his new wife. When death strikes, was it a Mafia hit or someone closer to home?.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 54
programme.desc: A major event at the restaurant goes disastrously wrong when a health inspector arrives — and a shocking discovery is found in Aunty Lee’s food, putting the business in serious jeopardy.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 13 关键证人
programme.desc: Dex and Da Peng bring Dan Nong to the freezer warehouse, where they interrogate him to reveal the mastermind behind the village massacre. Dan Nong refuses to speak. Guo Ying and her two partners track them down, and Dex urges Da Peng to leave, but Da Peng holds Dan Nong hostage and forces Guo Ying to retreat. Meanwhile, the police arrive. Upon seeing there's no way out, Da Peng kills Dan Nong.

programme.title: Key Witness - EP 14 关键证人
programme.desc: The Hong Kong police want Nick, who used to be an undercover agent, to testify in court for a gang vendetta case. However, the gang kidnaps him, ties him up and dumps him into the sea. As Nick was on the brink of death, Guo Ying and her two partners arrive in time, and Zhi Ming plunges into the waters to rescue him.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 19 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Blossom pretends that she is pregnant and asks Jia Hong for money, forcing Jia Hong to rob. Shu Juan and Xiao Long want Jia Hong to bring Blossom to meet them. Shu Juan exposes that Blossom is not pregnant, and that she wants to cheat Jia Hong's money. Blossom's motives are exposed, and in a fit of anger, she breaks up with Jia Hong. Jia Hong is heartbroken, and he takes his anger out on Shu Juan, as he is unhappy that she has broken them up.

programme.title: Dear Neighbours - EP 20 我的左邻右里
programme.desc: Xi Yue sleeps with Yu Jie after getting drunk. Feeling regretful, she quickly goes back home. Yan Xun apologises to Xi Yue that he is unable to celebrate their wedding anniversary. He gives her a gift, and informs her that he will be going overseas to work. Xi Yue becomes emotional. Yan Xun finds out that Xi Yue has an affair, and is taken aback by the news. Xi Yue is unable to face Yan Xun, so she leaves the house. Yan Xun confronts Yu Jie aggressively, and demands Yu Jie to leave the house.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 13 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. Among the many talented individuals of that era, she stands out from the crowd, due in no small part to her knowledge of warfare, weapons and magic. Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.

programme.title: My Fair Lady - EP 14 我爱钟无艳
programme.desc: According to the legend, during the Period of the Warring States, there was a woman gifted with immense abilities. Her name is Zhong Wu Yan. programme.title: The 4 Chefs - EP 10 四大名厨
programme.desc: An outdoor reality cooking series featuring four well-loved celebrity chefs in a culinary quest.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Frontline - EP 4 前线追踪
programme.desc: Latest statistics results show that fewer fresh graduates found work within 6 months in 2025. A study has also shown that as AI advances, there is a risk of the middle management being hollowed out. What are the challenges faced by graduates and middle managers in Singapore in their job search? What practical advice do experts have for these job seekers to boost their chances of getting employed?

programme.title: Timeless Memories - EP 13 业落夕阳
programme.desc: Cheng see his faint shadow in the mirror, but Liang’s remains clear. When the mirror with magical powers vanishes, Liang suspects it’s turned to ashes. He realises that paper offerings that are brought to life return to ashes after 100 days and is anxious that Cheng doesn’t have much time left. Liang Yan appears in Liang’s dream and tells him that Cheng can be saved if someone takes his place.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 19 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 3 侠医
programme.desc: Yingyin goes missing, and while searching for her, Yingchen mistakenly suspects Weimin of having ill intentions toward her. In her panic, Yingchen attacks him, but when she falls, Weimin catches her and saves her.

programme.title: Focus - EP 4 焦点
programme.desc: Iran-backed groups (Hezbollah, Houthis, Hamas) continue to shape Middle East dynamics, with a focus on how they rose to power. Nuclear weapons are held by only a few countries, raising questions about security and fairness. AI-generated fake videos are spreading misinformation, making it increasingly difficult to distinguish reality from falsehood.

programme.title: Taste of Life - EP 1074 甘味人生
programme.desc: Chu-Tsai, Chao and his wife have five children. Devoted all his life into developing soy sauce products, Chu-Tsai very much hopes that one of his kids can follow his footsteps and take over his business, but he also respects their own passions and aspirations. Because of their father's invention dream, the Chao brother's lives are about to change.

It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurred vision for clearer, more comfortable vision.

With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness.

programme.title: No Return - EP 19 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: Guichan orders a grave exhumation and sends a prostitute to spy on Maocai. Though no evidence is found, her gut tells her something is off.

programme.title: No Return - EP 20 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: Maocai recounts his tragic past and hatred for the Deng family, blaming Deng Yongshou for his fiancée’s death and his own wrongful imprisonment.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 477 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 4 侠医
programme.desc: Yingchen is forced to take over the sale of an old shophouse and unexpectedly runs into Weimin there. He treats her ankle injury again and reveals his interest in buying the property, while Qiting, upon learning his identity, plans to secretly snatch the deal.

programme.title: Love 972 You Are My Favourite - EP 6 Love 972 皇上的最爱
programme.desc: Side Mission (Protectors ’Camp): Earn money to buy information — success. Eunuch Su’s mission continues to fail Concubine Shen’s mission succeeds. All players debate the identity information they hold and determine the final relic’s Guardian. Final twist and punishment: The losing team must eat a giant pot of Zhe Er Gen (折耳根)!

programme.title: Shenzhen Foodbusters - EP 6 吃货横扫深圳
programme.desc: Going north to eat, drink and have fun has become a hot topic among Hong Kong people. Of course, viewers want to get more relevant information before traveling. The "Foodie" hosts goes to Shenzhen to explore stores and provide delicious and fun tips. People flock to Shenzhen for its affordable food. "Crab Roe Noodles" are available for RMB10, and Omakase containing sea urchin can be tasted for RMB200, which is equally attractive.

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 1 老人与孩
programme.desc: At a class reunion, the seemingly wealthy Chris hides her bankruptcy from her classmates, Yutong lies about a happy family life and Manle hides his illness and death of a family member—all for pride’s sake. When they expose a scam and stumble upon a teahouse, they are offered a special tea by its owner Miss Golden that will let them to relive and change their lives.

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Mystery of Middle East: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia - EP 18 中东密探
programme.desc: After getting up close and personal with a variety of wild animals at Riyadh's largest wildlife park, head out to hop aboard the latest form of public transportation. After tasting a variety of the most famous desserts in the Middle East, you will not only have close contact with wild camels but also drive through the Grand Canyon. Finally, arrival at the most stunning attraction in Saudi Arabia, the Cliff of the World.

programme.title: Legend of the Female General - EP 35 锦月如歌
programme.desc: A female general with a gentle appearance but a strong inner spirit, and a male general with a cold exterior and internal but with stronger martial prowess. They join forces to combat deceit, help the weak, and eliminate external threats.

programme.title: Joy of Life 2 - EP 36 庆余年 2
programme.desc: The drama continues from the first season of the Joy of Life trilogy, following the story of Fan Xian as he gains a stronghold in the court to eventually overthrow Emperor Liu Yu.

programme.desc: Oh Soo-jae is a talented lawyer who gets caught up in an unexpected case. At law school, she meets the student Gong Chan, who falls in love with her and would do anything to protect her.

programme.title: Hit 2025 - EP 8 打歌 2025
programme.desc: The program features a "live broadcast and voting" format. Each episode features six artists performing new (unreleased) songs. Based on voting results and professional judges' opinions, a top-ranked artist is chosen from each episode, and the winning song receives ongoing promotional opportunities.

Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.
